title: Fix type-parameterized interface as a port parameter

features.name: type_parameterized_interface_definition
features.description: Code should include an interface with a type parameter using 'parameter type' syntax

features.name: type_parameter_propagation_to_child_interface
features.description: Code should include a module with a type parameter that instantiates a parameterized interface passing the type through

features.name: interface_port_without_explicit_parameterization
features.description: Code should include a module with an interface port where the interface type itself has parameters that need to be deduced

features.name: hierarchical_interface_reference_as_port_connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a hierarchical interface reference is passed as an interface port argument
